_meta.description: Adversary-in-a-Box lab telemetry indices (P7/S3). Attaches the aib-retention-7d ILM policy and single-node-friendly settings to every lab index pattern. Composable template; applies only to indices created after it is installed.
_meta.replicas_note: number_of_replicas is 0 because the lab runs a single ES node -- a replica would have nowhere to allocate and would pin every index to status yellow. On a multi-node cluster, raise this to >=1 for redundancy.
